items.title: Balende Bosz werpt blik op coëfficiënten: 'Op de grens van het tafellaken'
items.summary: Door de eliminatie van PSV en Ajax in de Champions League liet Nederland dure punten liggen met het oog op de coëfficiëntenranglijst. Trainer Peter Bosz legde de vinger op de zere plek na de thuisnederlaag tegen Bayern München .

items.title: Flinke schorsingen voor bondsoach Senegal en Saibari na Afrika Cup-finale
items.summary: De Afrikaanse voetbalbond heeft flinke straffen uitgedeeld naar aanleiding van de tumultueuze Afrika Cup-finale tussen Marokko en Senegal . Ismael Saibari is drie duels geschorst vanwege zijn rol in het handdoekincident, de Senegalese bondscoach Pape Thiaw kreeg vijf duels aan zijn broek.

items.title: PSV wilde eigen speelstijl trouw blijven: 'Achteraf is het makkelijk praten'
items.summary: Door een prachtig doelpunt van Ismael Saibari kwam PSV woensdag in de slotfase op gelijke hoogte met Bayern München. Dat de Eindhovenaren op dat moment virtueel in de tussenronde van de Champions League stonden, wist de doelpuntenmaker niet. 'Ik was te ver van de bank af.'

items.title: Nét niet genoeg: de lessen die PSV leerde in dit Champions League-seizoen
items.summary: Het Champions League-avontuur van PSV is ten einde na een nederlaag tegen Bayern München: 1-2. Wat is de ploeg van Peter Bosz wijzer geworden van de reis langs acht opponenten uit de top van Europa?

items.title: Today on Sky Sports Racing: Lingfield hosts seven-race all-weather card
items.summary: Space Invasion headlines an intriguing feature contest from Lingfield, where three last-time-out winners line up.

items.title: Housby: When England play South Africa it's always a grudge match
items.summary: England star Helen Housby is looking for the Vitality Roses to make a statement in a “huge” series against South Africa this week.

items.title: Madrid, PSG drop to UCL playoffs in chaotic finale...
items.summary: Real Madrid were stunningly dumped into the qualifying playoffs of the Champions League by former coach Jose Mourinho on Wednesday and will be joined there by Paris Saint-Germain.

items.title: Mourinho admits confusion before Benfica GK goal
items.summary: José Mourinho hailed his Benfica team after a 4-2 win over Real Madrid kept them in the Champions League, while admitting that confusion over the goal difference needed to progress almost saw them eliminated.

items.title: Mbappé slams Madrid loss: We didn't show desire
items.summary: Kylian Mbappé slammed Real Madrid's attitude and inconsistency, saying the team aren't playing like "a team of champions" after a 4-2 defeat at Benfica saw them miss out on the Champions League top eight.

items.title: Pep admits City UCL panic over Mourinho strategy
items.summary: Pep Guardiola revealed Manchester City were panicking over their Champions League hopes as Benfica pushed for a late goal against Real Madrid.

items.title: Champions League talking points: Mourinho's master...
items.summary: With all 36 Champions League teams in action simultaneously, Matchday 8 of the league phase delivered plenty of drama to cap a fun competition so far. ESPN FC's writers pick out their highs and lows of the tournament to this point.

items.title: PSV op Rapport: Mauro Júnior ondanks rode kaart uitblinker, geen onvoldoendes
items.summary: Mauro Júnior was woensdagavond de grote uitblinker bij PSV. De Eindhovenaren verloren van Bayern München en zijn daardoor uitgeschakeld in de Champions League. De Braziliaan kreeg een rode kaart (twee keer geel), maar was wel de beste man van het veld.

items.title: Trubin's 'miracle' - how Mourinho's Benfica stunned Real Madrid
items.summary: Goalkeeper Anatoly Trubin's header gives Jose Mourinho an unforgettable moment as Benfica beat Real Madrid to stay alive in the Champions League.

items.title: Rosenior comes out on top as Conte's European woes continue
items.summary: Antonio Conte lifted the Champions League as a player in 1995-96 but has experienced nothing but despair as a manager in the competition.

items.title: Newcastle prove they can mix it with European champions
items.summary: Newcastle United have experienced all manner of emotions at the Parc des Princes, but the visitors left with immense pride following a 1-1 draw against Paris St-Germain

items.title: Why have English teams dominated as Real & PSG face play-offs?
items.summary: Five of the eight teams to qualify automatically for the Champions League were from the Premier League, so why have they been so dominant?

items.title: LIV Golf announces format changes amid ranking points pursuit
items.summary: LIV Golf have confirmed tweaks for 2026 that appear aimed at supporting the competition's application to receive Official World Golf Ranking points.

items.title: Champions League knockout phase play-off draw: All you need to know
items.summary: The Champions League league phase is over - we know eight teams heading for the last 16, but who now has two extra games in their schedules for the right to join them, and who will they play?

items.title: Antetokounmpo preparing to leave Milwaukee as Bucks listen to trade offers
items.summary: Milwaukee Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo is preparing to ‌say farewell to the franchise with which he has spent his entire NBA career as the team listen to trade offers for him, according to ESPN.

items.title: Champions League: Benfica keeper’s last-gasp header sends side into playoffs
items.summary: Anatoliy Trubin scores dramatic goal against Real Madrid Barça and Sporting in last 16, Bodø/Glimt make playoffs Goalkeeper Anatoliy Trubin scored a 98th-minute header as Benfica defeated Real Madrid 4-2 to secure a Champions League knockout place on Wednesday and deny their opponents an automatic spot in the last 16. Benfica were heading out despite leading 3-2 with seconds of stoppage time remaining before Trubin met a free-kick to score the goal they needed to get into the playoff round on goal difference. Continue reading...
